import subprocess, sys, time

proc = subprocess.Popen\(
    [sys.executable, 'server/server.py'],
    stdin=subprocess.PIPE, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE
\)
time.sleep\(4\)
ret = proc.poll\(\)
print\('returncode:', ret\)
if ret is not None:
    err = proc.stderr.read\(\)
    print\('stderr:', err.decode\(errors='replace'\)\)
else:
    print\('still running'\)
    proc.terminate\(\)
")

Bash(cd C:/Users/029188/Development/my-agent-app && rm -rf server/chroma_data2 && .venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import chromadb, uuid, math
from pathlib import Path

def hash_embed\(text, dim=256\):
    vec = [0.0] * dim
    s = text.lower\(\)
    for i in range\(max\(1, len\(s\) - 3\)\):
        gram = s[i:i+4]
        vec[hash\(gram\) % dim] += 1.0
    mag = math.sqrt\(sum\(x*x for x in vec\)\) or 1.0
    return [x/mag for x in vec]

p = Path\('server/chroma_data_test'\)
p.mkdir\(exist_ok=True\)
c = chromadb.PersistentClient\(path=str\(p\)\)
col = c.get_or_create_collection\('test', metadata={'hnsw:space': 'cosine'}\)
emb = hash_embed\('hello world'\)
col.add\(documents=['hello world'], embeddings=[emb], metadatas=[{'source':'test'}], ids=[str\(uuid.uuid4\(\)\)]\)
print\('col.add ok, count=', col.count\(\)\)
" 2>&1 && rm -rf server/chroma_data_test)
